Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

I think the removal of the "cat" is making the entire test lose its core purpose.  I think the right solution is to just remove the "|| error" part, and accept that "cat" may return an error, but consider it a success when the test didn't crash.

parents.subject: LU-14355 ptlrpc: do not output error when imp_sec is freed

commit.subject: LU-13751 tests: remove read of changelog sanity 160j
commit.message:
LU-13751 tests: remove read of changelog sanity 160j

sanity test 160j tries to read the changelog after one of two
client mounts is unmounted.  In this case, we can fail to read
the changelog and get a "Cannot send after transport endpoint
shutdown" error.

The intention of sanity test 160j is to check that
there is no LBUG due to missed obd device.  So, do not try to
read from the changelog after file system unmount.
